evidence: Argyle et al. introduce silicon sampling and demonstrate its viability via demographic conditioning of GPT-3
Paper defines algorithmic fidelity and provides empirical validation on ANES and Pigeonholing Partisans
Provides empirical evidence that GPT-3 with demographic backstories replicates ANES subpopulation response distributions
Shows that intersectional multi-attribute demographic conditioning outperforms single-attribute conditioning for attitude replication
Algorithmic fidelity is the key evaluation property for assessing silicon sampling quality
